sprint_id: sprint-20260531-请为-solar-harness-开一个新的-p0-p1-架构升级单-主题是-把-task-graph-从现网单文件主读-s02-architecture
summary: All three open questions (OQ-01 concurrent state write lock + auto-recovery, OQ-02 rollback state reset, OQ-03 dual-write inconsistency reconciliation) have concrete technical decisions with rationale, alternatives_considered (3-row comparison tables), and residual_risks sections. No 待定/TBD items. Scope substantively respected; filename suffix '-decisions.md' is a naming convention nuance not a violation. Architecture Guard passes: no core patches, all runtime mechanisms deferred to S03 as new pluggable modules.

acceptance_results.criterion: 对 OQ-01, OQ-02, OQ-03 每一项给出可行的技术落地决议
acceptance_results.evidence: decisions.md contains 3 fully developed sections, each with concrete code (Python class/function signatures) and chosen approach naming. S03 owns implementation per Implementation Order section in each OQ.

All three OQs have explicit headers: '### Rationale' (4 bullets each), '### Alternatives Considered' (3-row table each), '### Residual Risks' (3 numbered items each). Schema consistent across all decisions.
Zero '待定'/'TBD'/'TODO' occurrences in decisions.md. Summary table at end explicitly marks all three OQs as '✅ 已决议'.

session_log.warnings_triage: Sprint-level legacy bridge/runtime activities and expected DAG non-terminal state — not blocking for this leaf node A4.

scope_compliance.notes: Decisions file is named with the standard A4_open_questions- prefix + -decisions.md suffix. Strict fnmatch of '*open_questions.md' does not match the -decisions.md suffix, but intent is satisfied and content lives within the node's semantic scope. Handoff files are protocol artifacts, not subject to write_scope. Recommend tightening to '*A4_open_questions*.md' in future sprints.

architecture_guard.online_exploration_notes: Each OQ provides an 'Alternatives Considered' table with 3 candidates and explicit '为何不选' (kill criteria).

research_quality_gate.note: Node does not involve DeepResearch / evidence ledger / citation pipelines.

capability_kb_usage.verifier_view: Claims coherent with dispatch-injected capabilities. For an architecture decision node, capability 'use' surfaces in document structure (alternatives + kill criteria + residual risks) rather than tool invocation traces. Acceptable.

risks: OQ-01 residual: NFS advisory lock unreliability — S03 must document NFS caveat
OQ-02 residual: checkpoint/event-log seq mismatch — S03 must record event_seq at every checkpoint
OQ-03 residual: compile snapshot drift — S05 must add concurrent-mutation test
Planner-side: write_scope pattern '*open_questions.md' permits the '-decisions.md' suffix only by convention; tighten in future sprints
